welcome_message:
Welcome to Clawdius Discussions! 🦀

Before posting, please:
- Check the [Documentation](https://docs.clawdius.dev)
- Search existing discussions
- Use appropriate category

Be respectful and helpful. See our [Code of Conduct](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md).
